cards.back: AEC stands for Advanced Environmental Concept, a template for waste management options.
Annexure-IV SSC stands for Self-Study Component, a part of the course where students study case studies on waste management options.
E-Waste stands for Electronic Waste, waste generated from the disposal of electronic devices such as computers, smartphones, and televisions.
Textbook 1: CH- 6 likely refers to a chapter in a textbook that focuses on waste management options.
Waste Management refers to the process of handling, treating, and disposing of waste in a way that minimizes harm to the environment and public health.
